svg.title: Inverted file, index time
svg.desc: A training sample feeds k-means, producing four centroids. Each database vector, shown for x(1), finds its nearest centroid and is appended to that cell's posting list. The stored index is one posting list per cell.
svg.text: Index time — offline, once per corpus
nearest cell for x(1) — this routing repeats for every database vector
the stored index: one posting list per cell
